title: Lesser and Pavey Hand Painted Lily Gin Glass 600ml – Pink Balloon Style for Gin and Wine, Lovely Gift for Women and Men, Designed by Lynsey Johnstone, Luxury Wine Glass for Every Occasion

Premium Quality Glassware: Made from durable, high-quality blown glass with a 600ml capacity—ideal for everyday use or stylish parties

Stylish Glass for Every Occasion: A standout piece of tableware—both functional and decorative
